compiled_state.title: Add gap classification step to sprint Phase 7 and create gap-classification.md prompt
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Context
Story 1826-b0ee: Implementation task. Add gap classification logic to sprint/SKILL.md Phase 7 (Remediation) and create the gap-classification.md prompt file. Tasks 0ded-6519 (contract), 1104-9112 (scaffold), and d47c-503a (RED eval) must be complete before this task runs.

Read `plugins/dso/docs/contracts/gap-classification-output.md` first — it defines the exact output format.

## What To Do

### 1. Create `plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/gap-classification.md`

This prompt file is dispatched as an LLM sub-agent to classify each failing SC during Phase 7 remediation.

The prompt must:
- Accept context: failing SC text, a description of what the implementation actually does (from test output or validation findings), and the epic title/context
- Classify each SC as `intent_gap` or `implementation_gap` using the criteria from the contract:
  - intent_gap: SC text does not match what the implementation actually does (ambiguous or wrong intent)
  - implementation_gap: SC is clear and achievable but not fully implemented (technical gap)
- Output one classification line per failing SC in the canonical format from the contract:
  `GAP_CLASSIFICATION: <intent_gap|implementation_gap> ROUTING: <brainstorm|implementation-plan> EXPLANATION: <reason>`
- Document the classification heuristic clearly so future maintainers understand the decision logic

The prompt must also handle REPLAN_ESCALATE awareness: if a REPLAN_ESCALATE signal was emitted by implementation-plan for this SC (indicating the SC cannot be satisfied even with more tasks), classify as intent_gap.

### 2. Modify `plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md` Phase 7 (Remediation)

After the existing Reversion Detection step and BEFORE Step 1 (Create Remediation Tasks), add a new step titled "Gap Classification Step":

1. For each failing success criterion from Phase 6 validation, dispatch the gap-classification.md sub-agent with:
   - The failing SC text
   - What the implementation currently does (from validation findings/test output)
   - Epic context (title, description)
2. Parse the GAP_CLASSIFICATION output lines:
   - `intent_gap` + `ROUTING: brainstorm`: present a brainstorm routing recommendation to the user and REQUIRE user confirmation before proceeding. Do NOT autonomously invoke brainstorm.
   - `implementation_gap` + `ROUTING: implementation-plan`: the existing Phase 7 remediation flow (create bug tasks, return to Phase 3) is appropriate. Proceed autonomously.
3. Handle REPLAN_ESCALATE integration: if a previous implementation-plan invocation returned REPLAN_ESCALATE for this SC, override any implementation_gap classification to intent_gap.
4. Failure contract: if gap-classification.md sub-agent fails, treat all failing SC as intent_gap (requires user confirmation) — this is the safe default.
5. Document the distinction: include a note that this step classifies the GAP TYPE, not the fix itself. Sprint orchestrator integration (routing to brainstorm/implementation-plan) is in epic 9d3e-957d.

## Files to Create/Modify
- `plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/gap-classification.md` (new)
- `plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md` (modify Phase 7)

## Acceptance Criteria

### AC1: gap-classification.md prompt file exists
```
Verify: test -f plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/gap-classification.md && echo PASS
```

### AC2: gap-classification.md outputs canonical GAP_CLASSIFICATION signal format
```
Verify: grep -q 'GAP_CLASSIFICATION:' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/gap-classification.md && echo PASS
```

### AC3: gap-classification.md documents intent_gap and implementation_gap criteria
```
Verify: grep -q 'intent_gap' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/gap-classification.md && grep -q 'implementation_gap' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/gap-classification.md && echo PASS
```

### AC4: sprint/SKILL.md Phase 7 contains Gap Classification step
```
Verify: grep -q 'Gap Classification' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md && echo PASS
```

### AC5: Phase 7 documents user confirmation requirement for intent_gap
```
Verify: grep -B5 -A10 'Gap Classification' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md | grep -q 'user confirmation\|confirmation.*required' && echo PASS
```

### AC6: Phase 7 documents REPLAN_ESCALATE override
```
Verify: grep -q 'REPLAN_ESCALATE' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md && echo PASS
```

### AC7: Phase 7 documents failure contract (treat all as intent_gap on classifier failure)
```
Verify: grep -A20 'Gap Classification' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md | grep -q 'intent_gap\|safe default\|fail' && echo PASS
```

### AC8: RED eval passes (GREEN after implementation)
```
Verify: grep -c 'GAP_CLASSIFICATION' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml | awk '$1>=2{print "Eval tests present - run promptfoo eval to confirm GREEN"}'
```

### AC9: Shim check passes for both files
```
Verify: bash plugins/dso/scripts/check-shim-refs.sh plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/gap-classification.md && bash plugins/dso/scripts/check-shim-refs.sh plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md && echo PASS
```

comments.body:
GAP_ANALYSIS_AMENDMENT: Three findings applied.

AC10: REPLAN_ESCALATE consumption specified
6d2e-ffee must explicitly document: if a previous implementation-plan invocation returned REPLAN_ESCALATE for a specific SC, the sprint Phase 7 gap classifier must override any implementation_gap classification to intent_gap (sprint consumes, not emits, REPLAN_ESCALATE).
Verify: grep -q 'REPLAN_ESCALATE' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/gap-classification.md && grep -B5 -A10 'REPLAN_ESCALATE' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md | grep -q 'intent_gap' && echo PASS

AC11: Input extraction from completion-verifier output is specified
6d2e-ffee must document how Phase 7 extracts the SC criterion text and failure explanation from the Phase 6 completion-verifier output to pass to the gap-classification sub-agent.
Verify: grep -A15 'Gap Classification' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md | grep -q 'criterion\|SC text\|failure explanation\|completion-verifier' && echo PASS

AC12: Failure fallback behavior implemented (not just documented in contract)
On sub-agent dispatch failure, timeout, or unparseable output: treat all failing SC as intent_gap with ROUTING: brainstorm. No SC may be silently dropped. Log warning when fallback applies.
Verify: grep -A20 'Gap Classification' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md | grep -q 'intent_gap\|fallback\|failure.*classif' && echo PASS

Source: Gap analysis findings 2, 3, and 4
comments.author: Test
